title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 66.710 - Amendments to the county constitution, procedure, effective when
text:
66.710.  Amendments to the county constitution, procedure, effective when. — All amendments to such county constitution shall be approved by the voters and shall become part of the county constitution at the time and under the conditions fixed in the amendments.
(L. 1993 H.B. 551 & 552 § 2 subsec. 7 merged with S.B. 67 § 10 subsec. 7 merged with S.B. 88 § 1 subsec. 7)
